title: My Solo Trip to Switzerland 🇨🇭 one week in the swiss alps travel vlog ⛰️
description: Grüezi! For my golden birthday this year, I decided to head back to Switzerland to do a do-over of my messy solo trip 2 years ago. It was my first time in Switzerland and my first international solo trip, and everything went wrong...I got really frustrated while editing that vlog lol and then I never uploaded it 😵‍💫 But this year, equipped with a fully developed frontal lobe and a stronger handle on public transportation, I decided to head back to Switzerland for my 26th birthday to create the ~
